steps.assistant_text: 30-insn linked-list-prepend allocator wrapper. Promoted from -O2-blocked NM cap via file-split into bootup_uso_o0_118E4.c with -O0 OPT_FLAGS. The sp+0x1C/0x20/0x24 spill-and-reload pattern is unmistakable -O0 IDO emit (no register promotion). Migration model from kernel/o1o2_split.md applied to bootup_uso -O2/-O0 mix. Applied recipe from feedback_o0_file_split.md / project_o1o2_split.md.

metadata.verification: Verified via byte_verify: build/non_matching/.o byte-identical to expected/.o for symbol (size 0x78 = 120 bytes / 30 insns). Required -O0 file split out of bootup_uso_tail3a.c (which is -O2 -g3).
